progress_summary: v1.4 PR 1 (ADEV-328) shipped as #192 → 4cb0b09 — pack registry architecture is live on main. The a11y track also wrapped this session: PR #196 (ADEV-339-342, squash 08377ea) cleared the original ADEV-338 LHCI batch (TOC min-height, Shiki dual-theme, band-label color, /changelog underlines), and PR #197 (ADEV-343-347, squash ba8d0cc) shipped the root-cause follow-ups when the first batch did not fully clear LHCI: walker uses closest() to skip Shiki nested spans (kills phantom <mark>), TOC scope-attribute copy so JS-injected <li>/<a> inherit Astro scoped CSS (min-height 44px now applies), .band-label gets background:var(--bg) + z-index:1 to occlude SVG glow bleed, and a global Shiki dark-theme CSS switch so dark-mode pages use the dark palette instead of the low-contrast light theme. Final LHCI: every audited route at A11y 1.00 (architecture and changelog perf 0.89/0.92 unchanged, both warn-level). Production remains on 526a9a2 (v1.4 not yet released — PR 8 ADEV-331 ships the release). Orchestrator handoff continues to stack-forge for PR 2 (ADEV-329): backfill the 5 existing stacks (typescript/python/ruby/go/rust) as language packs to dogfood the schema. Approved scope: all 5 in one PR, conservative ≤50KB compression of existing references/ into per-pack langRef docs, no framework packs (those land in PRs 4-7). No blockers.

key_decisions: v1.4 theme: coverage-as-a-plugin-registry. skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + reference docs replace hardcoded stack tables.
Apple/iOS ships in v1.4.0 (PR 6) — pressure-tests the kind: mobile dispatch branch. Android/Flutter/RN deferred to v1.5 once release-ops handles Play Store + EAS.

Distribution model: bundle-everything in opchain-skills.zip. Per-pack flags (skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled) filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded — keeps regulated/air-gapped installs intact.
5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). Other ~13 skills stay at 1.2.0.
8-PR sequencing: PRs 1-3 serial (architecture → backfill → dispatcher), PRs 4-7 parallelizable, PR 8 last (release).
ADEV-333 was created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332.

LHCI a11y failures on #187 (TOC touch size, code-block contrast, band labels, changelog links) are pre-existing — unrelated to the JSON-only diff. Standing up as ADEV-338 family on a separate branch off main, NOT BLOCKING v1.4.

user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when the PR sequence is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.
Approves merges promptly once CI is green; deploys are always manual.
Skips non-actionable bot replies on PRs (no noise back to LHCI bot).

next_actions: Resume v1.4 PR 2 (ADEV-329) — stack-forge.checkpoint.json says `pr-1-shipped-pr-2-starting / in_progress`. Backfill 5 language packs (typescript, python, ruby, go, rust). Read stack-forge.next_actions[0] for the starting move.

Cut PR 2 branch from current origin/main (fd0db7f — includes ADEV-328 architecture + the seven new pages from #194 + the demo expansion from #195 + the a11y track from #196/#197). Use a descriptive name like claude/adev-329-pack-backfill.
After PR 2 lands, stack-forge moves to pr-3-starting (ADEV-330 — deploy-ops dispatcher + api-dev pack-read + kind:mobile branch). PRs 4-7 parallelize after PR 3.
